tasks.title: Audit current responsive design, app shell, routes, pages, components, CSS, Tailwind config, PWA config, and storage usage
tasks.description: Perform a comprehensive audit of the entire IELTS Journey frontend codebase including app shell, routing, all pages, components, CSS styles, Tailwind configuration, PWA manifest and service worker setup, and local storage usage. Identify all mobile responsiveness issues, PWA configuration problems, and storage persistence concerns. Document all findings in a detailed report listing issues by category and affected files.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete audit report covering responsive design, PWA config, storage usage
List of mobile layout issues per page/component
List of PWA manifest and meta tag issues
List of storage persistence and offline behavior issues
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed audit report enumerating all mobile responsiveness, PWA, and storage issues with references to affected files and components

outputPlan.description: Comprehensive audit report of mobile and PWA issues in IELTS Journey

metadata.inputContext: Project source code and configuration files
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a foundation for targeted mobile and PWA improvements

tasks.title: Fix root HTML viewport meta tag and app shell layout for mobile responsiveness
tasks.description: Modify the root HTML file (e.g., index.html) to ensure the viewport meta tag is correctly set for mobile devices with viewport-fit=cover. Adjust the app shell layout components to use full width, remove fixed desktop widths, and prevent horizontal overflow. Add safe area padding using CSS env variables for notch and home indicator support. Ensure the app root container uses responsive containers and mobile-first layout principles.
acceptanceCriteria: Viewport meta tag includes width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover
App shell uses responsive containers without fixed widths
Safe area CSS variables applied to top and bottom padding
No horizontal scroll on mobile viewports
tasks.expectedResult: Root HTML and app shell layout are mobile responsive with safe area support and no horizontal overflow

outputPlan.description: Update viewport meta tag and add PWA manifest link
Adjust app shell layout for full width and safe area padding

metadata.inputContext: Audit report findings on viewport and app shell layout
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures foundational mobile layout and safe area support

tasks.title: Fix and enhance PWA manifest and mobile meta tags for full mobile and iOS support
tasks.description: Review and update the PWA manifest file and related meta tags to meet best practices. Set correct app name, short name, start_url, scope, display mode, theme_color, background_color, and orientation. Ensure icons include maskable icon and proper sizes. Add or verify apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-title, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, and apple-touch-icon meta tags. Confirm viewport meta tag includes viewport-fit=cover. Use existing app primary and background colors for theme and background colors.
acceptanceCriteria: Manifest file has correct name, short_name, start_url, scope, display, theme_color, background_color, orientation
Manifest icons include maskable icon with correct sizes
Apple mobile web app meta tags present and correct
Viewport meta tag includes viewport-fit=cover
No placeholder or missing icons
tasks.expectedResult: PWA manifest and meta tags fully support mobile browsers and iOS Safari with correct icons and colors

outputPlan.description: Update PWA manifest with correct app details and icons
Add or update apple mobile web app meta tags

metadata.inputContext: Audit report findings on PWA manifest and meta tags
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures PWA and iOS mobile app compatibility

tasks.title: Fix global page container and safe area handling with reusable responsive components
tasks.description: Create or improve reusable responsive components such as PageContainer, MobilePageContainer, SafeAreaContainer, and StickyMobileActions. Refactor global page containers to use these components to enforce consistent mobile-first layout, safe area padding, and responsive widths. Remove any fixed widths or hardcoded paddings. Ensure consistent spacing and touch-friendly layout across all pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Reusable responsive container components created or improved
All pages use responsive containers with safe area padding
No fixed pixel widths or horizontal overflow
Consistent spacing and touch-friendly layout
tasks.expectedResult: Global page containers and safe area handling are consistent and mobile optimized using reusable components

outputPlan.description: Refactor PageContainer for responsive layout and safe area support
New component to handle CSS safe area insets for mobile devices
Create or improve MobilePageContainer for mobile-first layout

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous layout fixes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides consistent responsive containers and safe area support across the app

tasks.title: Fix mobile navigation behavior with bottom navigation, hamburger drawer, and floating AI Tutor button
tasks.description: Implement or fix mobile navigation patterns: use bottom navigation for main pages on mobile, hamburger drawer for full menu, and floating AI Tutor button if applicable. Ensure hamburger button only shows on mobile and drawer overlay does not break scrolling or cover content. Highlight active route clearly without ugly borders. Ensure navigation open/close works smoothly and does not block content or overlap safe areas. Floating AI Tutor button should be visible, high contrast, accessible, and positioned above bottom nav or safe area.
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom navigation visible on mobile with correct active highlight
Hamburger drawer opens and closes without scroll issues
Hamburger button hidden on desktop
Floating AI Tutor button visible and accessible without blocking content
No navigation overlap with safe areas or home indicator
tasks.expectedResult: Mobile navigation is touch friendly, functional, and visually consistent with safe area support

outputPlan.description: Implement bottom navigation and hamburger drawer with safe area and accessibility
Fix floating AI Tutor button position, visibility, and accessibility

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous layout and container fixes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Delivers a polished, accessible, and functional mobile navigation experience

tasks.title: Fix onboarding page mobile layout with single column, large touch targets, and sticky bottom navigation
tasks.description: Refactor onboarding pages to use single column layout on mobile with large touch targets (minimum 44px). Implement sticky bottom navigation if useful for progress and actions. Avoid horizontal scroll and crowded fields. Ensure progress indicator fits mobile screen. Use responsive containers and safe area padding. Verify all onboarding steps including date input, band score controls, weak skill selection, AI Tutor toggles, review step, and finish button are mobile friendly.
acceptanceCriteria: Onboarding pages use single column layout on mobile
All interactive elements meet minimum touch target size
Sticky bottom navigation present if useful
No horizontal scroll or cramped fields
Progress indicator fits mobile viewport
tasks.expectedResult: Onboarding flow is fully responsive and touch friendly on mobile devices

outputPlan.description: Refactor onboarding pages for mobile-first layout and touch targets

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous container and navigation fixes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves onboarding UX for mobile users

tasks.title: Fix dashboard mobile layout with single column cards and readable spacing
tasks.description: Refactor dashboard page to use a single column layout on mobile with cards stacked vertically. Ensure cards have readable text sizes, good spacing, and no cramped grids. Place important actions near the top. Avoid rainbow color overload and overflowing cards. Use responsive containers and safe area padding. Verify all dashboard cards including today mission, progress, quick actions, AI Tutor card, study plan summary, vocabulary review, and practice shortcuts are mobile optimized.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard uses single column layout on mobile
Cards have readable text and spacing
Important actions visible near top
No overflowing or cramped cards
tasks.expectedResult: Dashboard page is fully responsive and visually clear on mobile devices

outputPlan.description: Refactor dashboard layout and cards for mobile responsiveness

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous container and navigation fixes

tasks.title: Fix Today Plan page mobile width and layout with full width task cards and readable progress
tasks.description: Refactor Today Plan page to use full width task cards on mobile with wrapping actions. Ensure completion and skip buttons are touch friendly and wrap cleanly. Progress indicators should be readable and not cramped. Remove any fixed desktop container widths and prevent horizontal overflow. Use responsive containers and safe area padding.
acceptanceCriteria: Today Plan task cards use full width on mobile
Actions wrap cleanly and are touch friendly
Progress indicators readable
No horizontal overflow or fixed desktop widths
tasks.expectedResult: Today Plan page is fully responsive and touch friendly on mobile

outputPlan.description: Refactor Today Plan layout and task cards for mobile

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous container and navigation fixes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves usability of Today Plan on mobile

tasks.title: Fix AI Tutor mobile chat layout and floating button with accessible message bubbles and input
tasks.description: Refactor AI Tutor chat page for mobile: constrain chat message container width and message bubble max width, ensure long text and URLs wrap properly. Fix composer width and keyboard behavior so input is not hidden behind keyboard. Ensure send button is visible and accessible. Floating AI Tutor button should be positioned above bottom navigation or safe area, visible, high contrast, and have accessible label. Chat page height should allow scrollable chat history with sticky or accessible composer. Implement clean loading, error, and missing AI config states.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat message container and bubbles constrained and wrap text
Composer input visible and not hidden by keyboard
Send button visible and accessible
Floating AI Tutor button positioned correctly and accessible
Chat page scrollable with sticky composer
Loading, error, and missing config states handled cleanly
tasks.expectedResult: AI Tutor chat is fully functional, accessible, and visually optimized for mobile

outputPlan.description: Refactor AI Tutor chat layout and input for mobile
Adjust floating AI Tutor button for mobile accessibility

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous navigation and container fixes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Delivers a polished AI Tutor chat experience on mobile

tasks.title: Fix Vocabulary Notebook mobile layout and word family dropdown with clean wrapping and stacking
tasks.description: Refactor Vocabulary Notebook page for mobile: ensure vocabulary list items have clean layout with meaning text wrapping and part of speech badges visible. Review status and action buttons should not overflow. Word family dropdown should expand inside card and not overflow viewport. Filter controls and search should stack or scroll horizontally cleanly. Avoid overly colorful cards and fake data placeholders.
acceptanceCriteria: Vocabulary list items wrap text and display badges correctly
Action buttons and review status do not overflow
Word family dropdown expands inside card without overflow
Filter controls stack or scroll cleanly
No fake data placeholders visible
tasks.expectedResult: Vocabulary Notebook is fully responsive and usable on mobile devices

outputPlan.description: Refactor vocabulary notebook layout and dropdown for mobile

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous container and navigation fixes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves vocabulary notebook usability on mobile

tasks.title: Fix practice pages mobile layout for reading, listening, writing, speaking, grammar, and vocabulary
tasks.description: Refactor all practice pages to use readable content widths on mobile, avoid two-column layouts, and ensure audio controls fit screen. Textareas and input fields must be usable and not hidden behind keyboard. Feedback cards and result feedback should wrap properly. Buttons must be easy to tap with minimum touch target size. Use responsive containers and safe area padding. Verify AI feedback and practice controls are mobile friendly.
acceptanceCriteria: Practice pages use single column layout on mobile
Audio controls fit screen and are accessible
Textareas and inputs visible and usable
Feedback cards wrap and buttons are touch friendly
tasks.expectedResult: All practice pages are fully responsive and usable on mobile devices

outputPlan.description: Refactor practice pages for mobile responsiveness and usability

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous container and navigation fixes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures practice pages are mobile friendly and accessible

tasks.title: Fix Progress and Settings pages mobile layout with single column forms and touch friendly controls
tasks.description: Refactor Progress and Settings pages to use single column layouts on mobile. Forms should have full width inputs and selects. Toggles and buttons must meet minimum touch target size. API key fields and advanced settings should not overflow and can collapse if needed. Use responsive containers and safe area padding. Verify all settings pages including AI Provider Settings, Theme, Language, Proactive AI Tutor, Profile, and Extension settings are mobile optimized.
acceptanceCriteria: Progress and Settings pages use single column layout on mobile
Inputs and selects are full width
Toggles and buttons meet touch target size
No overflow or layout breakage
tasks.expectedResult: Progress and Settings pages are fully responsive and touch friendly on mobile

outputPlan.description: Refactor Progress page layout for mobile
Refactor Settings pages for mobile responsiveness

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous container and navigation fixes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves usability of Progress and Settings on mobile

tasks.title: Fix extension popup responsiveness if browser extension exists
tasks.description: If IELTS Journey includes a browser extension, audit and fix the extension popup UI for responsiveness at its own popup size. Ensure popup width and height fit common extension popup sizes without overflow. Vocabulary list, AI Tutor shortcut, settings, selected text menu, and auto highlight UI should be responsive and not break layout. Prevent CSS leakage or duplicate injected UI. Do not break extension behavior while improving mobile website.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension popup fits within popup viewport without overflow
All extension UI elements are responsive and usable
No CSS leakage or duplicate UI
Extension functionality remains intact
tasks.expectedResult: Browser extension popup is responsive and functional at its popup size

outputPlan.description: Refactor extension popup UI for responsiveness

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and previous layout fixes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures extension popup is usable and responsive

tasks.title: Fix storage persistence and offline behavior on mobile browsers
tasks.description: Verify and fix local-first storage usage on mobile browsers. Ensure IndexedDB works correctly and localStorage usage is safe and minimal. Confirm user profile, onboarding data, study plan, vocabulary, AI Tutor chat history, and proactive AI Tutor settings persist after refresh and offline. If service worker exists, ensure it does not break updates and app shell loads offline. Handle offline state clearly without broken UI or stale cache issues. Do not cache API secrets or create fake offline support.
acceptanceCriteria: IndexedDB and localStorage persist data correctly on mobile
User data persists after refresh and offline
Service worker supports offline without stale cache issues
Offline state UI is clear and not broken
No caching of sensitive data
tasks.expectedResult: Storage persistence and offline behavior work reliably on mobile devices

outputPlan.description: Fix storage usage and offline support for mobile
Fix service worker caching and offline behavior

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures reliable data persistence and offline support on mobile

tasks.title: Fix accessibility issues on mobile including font sizes, color contrast, focus states, and aria labels
tasks.description: Audit and fix accessibility issues on mobile UI. Ensure font sizes are readable and meet minimum size guidelines. Verify good color contrast for text and interactive elements. Add visible focus states for keyboard navigation. Add screen reader labels and aria attributes for icon-only buttons and form controls. Link error messages to form fields. Ensure touch targets meet minimum 44px size. Avoid relying only on color to convey information. Respect reduced motion preference for animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Font sizes meet accessibility guidelines
Color contrast meets WCAG standards
Focus states visible and keyboard navigation works
Aria labels present for icon buttons and forms
Error messages linked to fields
Touch targets meet minimum size
Animations respect reduced motion preference
tasks.expectedResult: Mobile UI is accessible and usable by keyboard and screen readers

outputPlan.description: Fix accessibility issues in UI components
Fix accessibility issues in pages

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves accessibility compliance and usability on mobile

tasks.title: Fix mobile performance issues including code splitting, lazy loading, image optimization, and virtualization
tasks.description: Analyze and fix mobile performance bottlenecks. Implement code splitting and lazy loading for heavy pages and components if not already done. Optimize images for mobile sizes. Use virtualization for long lists such as vocabulary or chat messages if needed. Memoize components to avoid unnecessary re-renders. Avoid heavy animations or effects on mobile. Reduce unnecessary local storage reads on every render. Ensure smooth scrolling and fast interactions on mobile devices.
acceptanceCriteria: Code splitting and lazy loading implemented for heavy pages
Images optimized for mobile
Virtualization used for long lists
Memoization reduces unnecessary re-renders
Animations reduced or optimized for mobile
Local storage reads minimized
Smooth scrolling and fast interactions on mobile
tasks.expectedResult: Mobile performance is improved with faster load times and smoother interactions

outputPlan.description: Add lazy loading and code splitting to heavy pages
Optimize images, add virtualization and memoization

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enhances mobile app speed and responsiveness

tasks.title: Test all mobile viewport sizes and user flows for responsiveness and usability
tasks.description: Perform manual and automated testing of the app on all specified viewport widths (320px, 360px, 375px, 390px, 414px, 430px, 768px, 1024px, desktop). Test key user flows including app open, PWA install, onboarding, dashboard, today plan, study task completion, AI Tutor messaging, vocabulary notebook usage, practice pages, progress page, settings, proactive AI Tutor toggling, AI provider configuration, mobile navigation usage, drawer open/close, bottom navigation, screen rotation, and page refresh with data persistence. Verify no horizontal scroll, no clipped content, no broken cards or modals, no tiny buttons or unreadable text, no input hidden behind keyboard, no console or build errors.
acceptanceCriteria: All viewport sizes tested with no layout or usability issues
All user flows complete without errors or broken UI
No horizontal scroll or clipped content
No console errors or build errors
tasks.expectedResult: App works smoothly and responsively on all tested mobile sizes and flows with no errors

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Validates mobile responsiveness and usability across devices

tasks.title: Run typecheck, lint, tests, and build to verify code quality and readiness
tasks.description: Run full type checking, linting, unit and integration tests, and production build to verify code quality and readiness for deployment. Fix any errors or warnings found. Confirm no TypeScript errors, no lint warnings, all tests pass, and build completes successfully.
acceptanceCriteria: No TypeScript errors
No lint warnings or errors
All tests pass
Production build completes successfully
tasks.expectedResult: Codebase is clean, tested, and buildable with no errors or warnings

metadata.inputContext: All previous fixes and tests completed
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms code quality and production readiness

tasks.title: Generate final report summarizing mobile issues found, fixes applied, tests performed, and PWA readiness
tasks.description: Compile a clear final report summarizing all mobile issues found during audit, all responsive layout and PWA configuration fixes applied, page-by-page mobile fixes, AI Tutor and Today Plan mobile fixes, vocabulary and onboarding mobile fixes, settings and extension popup fixes if applicable, storage and offline notes, accessibility and performance improvements, files changed, tests performed, remaining known issues, and PWA install readiness status. The report should be clear and actionable for stakeholders.
acceptanceCriteria: Final report covers all required sections
Report lists files changed and tests performed
Report states PWA install readiness clearly
Report notes any remaining known issues
tasks.expectedResult: A comprehensive final report documenting the mobile and PWA audit and improvements

outputPlan.description: Final report summarizing audit, fixes, tests, and readiness

metadata.inputContext: All previous audit, fixes, and test results
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides stakeholders with a clear summary of mobile and PWA readiness
